common.venueAddress: 9 Fire Place Neck Road, Brookhaven, New York 11719
common.welcomeMessage: We invite you to join us for an evening of celebration

ourStory.subtitle: Nearly two decades in the making
ourStory.intro: From university friends to lifelong partners—a love story that began in 2007 and never stopped growing.

chapterOne.label: Chapter One — Where It All Began
chapterOne.body:
Before forever, there was friendship—and then, love.

We met at the same university in 2007, sharing classrooms, laughter, and the simple joy of growing up side by side. What began as friendship soon turned into something more, and in 2008, we started our journey together.

Those university years—from 2008 to 2012—were filled with memories that shaped us, where love grew naturally, quietly, and beautifully.

We didn't know it then, but we were already building something that would last a lifetime.

chapterTwo.label: Chapter Two — From Us to Forever
chapterTwo.body:
What started as friendship slowly turned into something deeper.

Through the years, life changed—but one thing didn't: us. We grew, supported each other, and built a bond that only became stronger with time.

And in 2025, everything led to one unforgettable moment—a question, a pause, and a "yes" that meant forever.

chapterThree.label: Chapter Three — Forever Begins
chapterThree.body:
Now, we begin our next chapter.

From friendship… to love… to a lifetime together.

In 2025, we say "I do"—and start the most beautiful part of our story yet.

events.subtitle: The Wedding Festivities
events.intro: We invite you to join us for an evening of celebration, starting with our exchange of vows followed by dinner and dancing under the stars.
events.venueDescription: All festivities are held at one location:

ceremony.title: The Ceremony
ceremony.detail: Please be seated by 2:45 PM. The ceremony will begin promptly at 3:00 PM.

cocktail.title: Cocktail Hour
cocktail.detail: Enjoy hors d'oeuvres, signature cocktails, and time to mingle after the ceremony.
cocktail.note: Bar service includes beer, wine, and house cocktails.

reception.title: The Reception
reception.detail: Dinner service begins at 6:30 PM, followed by toasts and dancing into the evening.

events.transportDetail: The nearest LIRR station is a short distance from the venue — we recommend taking an Uber or Lyft from the station. Parking at the venue is limited, so rideshare is highly encouraged.

dressCode.subtitle: Style Guide
dressCode.intro: Your presence matters most, and your elegant attire will make the celebration even more beautiful.

dressy.title: Dressy Elegance
dressy.body:
We invite guests to dress in polished, elegant attire.

For men, suits or blazers with dress pants are encouraged. A tie is optional.

For women, both long and short dresses are welcome.

Please avoid overly casual attire such as jeans, athletic wear, or sneakers. We can't wait to celebrate with you and see your beautiful looks!

outdoor.title: Outdoor Setting
outdoor.body:
Our wedding celebration will take place outdoors on grass.

We recommend choosing footwear that is comfortable for walking on natural surfaces. Block heels, wedges, dressy flats, and loafers are all great options.

As the evening may become cooler, you may wish to bring a light layer for added comfort.

colors.title: Color Palette
colors.body:
Our wedding palette features soft neutrals, muted tones, and romantic pastels.

For women, we welcome champagne, taupe, sage, forest green, navy, dusty blue, mauve, lavender, blush pink, soft yellow, and similar elegant shades.

For men, navy, charcoal, gray, taupe, brown, forest green, and champagne-toned blazers are wonderful choices.

To help distinguish the wedding party, we kindly ask guests to avoid white, ivory, cream, white with black pants, and peach or salmon tones.

dressCode.paletteReserved: Reserved for the wedding party — please avoid

qAndA.subtitle: Helpful Details
qAndA.intro: A few helpful answers to make your experience easy, joyful, and stress-free.

faqs.question: What Time Should I Arrive?
faqs.answer: Please plan to arrive by 3:00 PM to allow time to find parking and get settled before the ceremony begins at 4:00 PM.

faqs.question: Is Parking Available at the Venue?
faqs.answer: Parking is very limited. Please use nearby street parking. Kindly do not park on the grass. Carpooling is encouraged!

faqs.question: Do you have a gift registry?
faqs.answer: Your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift of all. However, if you wish to honor us with a gift, we prefer monetary gift. Thank you for your generosity and love!

faqs.question: Will ceremony start on time?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ceremony will begin promptly at 4:00 PM. We recommend arriving by 3:00 PM to allow time for parking and finding your seat. We can't wait to celebrate with you!

faqs.question: Is the wedding outdoors?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wedding will be held outdoors on grass. We recommend wearing comfortable shoes suitable for walking on grass. Please also bring a light layer for the evening. We can't wait to celebrate with you in our beautiful outdoor setting!

faqs.question: Can I take Photos During the ceremony?
faqs.answer: We kindly ask that you refrain from taking photos during the ceremony. We have hired a professional photographer to capture every special moment, and we want everyone to be fully present and engaged in the experience. We will share the photos with you after the wedding so you can relive the memories!

faqs.question: Will there be food and drinks?
faqs.answer: Yes, we will have a delicious buffet-style dinner with a variety of options to accommodate different dietary preferences. We will also have a selection of beverages, including alcoholic and non-alcoholic options, to keep you refreshed throughout the celebration. We can't wait to share this meal with you!

faqs.question: What time will the celebration end?
faqs.answer: The celebration will officially end around 7:00 - 8:00 PM. However, we encourage everyone to stay and enjoy the festivities as long as they like! We will have music, dancing, and plenty of fun to keep the party going. We can't wait to celebrate with you until the very end!

faqs.question: Allergies or dietary restrictions?
faqs.answer: We can accommodate most dietary restrictions and allergies - please note any allergies or preferences (gluten-free, vegetarian, nuts, shellfish, etc.) on the RSVP form or contact us directly. Our caterer will label dishes accordingly. For severe allergies or medically necessary accommodations email us directly at myoandyoon@gmail.com so we can confirm safe options.

lookup.title: Find Your Invitation
lookup.subtitle: Enter the name and email you used when you were invited.

form.allergiesPlaceholder: Please list any allergies or dietary requirements…
form.editBanner: You've already submitted an RSVP. You're now updating your response.

formInfo.title: Location & Time
formInfo.description1: We are so excited to celebrate our special day with the people we love most. Please fill out the form to let us know if you can make it.
formInfo.description2: A confirmation will be sent to your email once your RSVP is received. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

success.heading: Thank you
success.attending: We cannot wait to celebrate with you.
success.updated: Your RSVP has been updated, {{name}}. We'll see you there!
success.confirmation: A confirmation has been sent to {{email}}.

contactUs.title: Please Reach Out
contactUs.message: It looks like we already have multiple RSVPs on file for your information. Please contact us directly and we'll get everything sorted out.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
errors.notOnList: We couldn't find your name on our guest list. Please double-check the spelling or reach out to us directly for help.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

travel.subtitle: Getting Here

tips.title: LIRR & Rideshare
tips.body: The nearest LIRR station is located a short distance from the venue. Guests may take an Uber or Lyft from the station for convenience.

tips.title: Parking
tips.body: Due to limited parking at the venue, rideshare is highly encouraged. If you choose to drive, please arrive early and allow extra time for parking. If the parking area is full, kindly use nearby street parking and do not park on the grass.

tips.title: Carpool
tips.body:
A carpool will be available for guests at Jamaica Center–Parsons/Archer station. Please meet at the station by 1:00 PM for the ride to the venue.

A return carpool will also be arranged at the end of the evening to bring guests back to the station.

travel.parkingCaption: Parking map — highlighted spots are recommended. A detailed map will be added closer to the date.
travel.registryIntro: Your presence is the greatest gift of all. If you wish to honor us with a gift, we have selected pieces that will help us build our home and future together.
